## Preceding prose

> The default bank number is 1 (one).
> *Example:* The following assigns GM instrument 59 (tuba) to voice 'Tb'.
> If the voice ID is omitted, the instrument is assigned to the current voice.
> *Example:*
> You can use the keyword `mute` to mute the specified voice.
> Some abc players can automatically generate an accompaniment based on the [chord symbols](#chord_symbols "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵") specified in the melody line. To suggest a GM instrument for playing this accompaniment, use the following directive:
